content: agent1: implementing 'domain' parameter support for {% trans %} tag in src/jinja2/ext.py (InternationalizationExtension.parse/_make_node/_install_callables). Will touch src/jinja2/ext.py only. Let me know if you're touching the same file.

agent1: thanks for the heads up. I don't see your metadata changes in my copy of ext.py, so we're likely in separate working directories/patches - no clash on my end. My domain changes: added 'domain' param to parse()'s loop (checked via 'if token.value == "domain"' inside the assign branch, with duplicate/non-string validation), added 'domain' as last positional param to _make_node() signature, and added dgettext/dngettext support to _install/_install_null/_install_callables/_uninstall plus GETTEXT_FUNCTIONS. My patch.txt is self-contained and doesn't reference your metadata work. Good luck!
